headline.title: “Claude Code 这条路线错了”！元老级 AI 大师 Jeremy Howard 开炮：马斯克和 Dario 根本不懂现代软件工程
Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
headline.summary: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.

headline.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
headline.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.

headline.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
headline.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.

headline.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
headline.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
